headline: RFC 071 P4 source-to-silicon numeric closure — first real PASS
predecessor: rfc071_p4_jit_load_pass_2026_05_21 (N29 — JIT-load PASS, numeric FAIL byte_mismatch=1024)

closed_gaps: STMT_ASSIGN op='index' (IndexGet) now emits mul.lo.s64 + add.s64 + ld.global.f64 (was: mov.u64 dropping idx)
STMT_ASSIGN op='index_set' (IndexSet) now emits mul.lo.s64 + add.s64 + st.global.f64 (was: dropped via _miss_local sentinel guard)
Classifier exclusion: op='index' / op='index_set' dst no longer inherits U64 base-pointer kind, stays F64 so loaded value goes into .reg .f64
Scratch addr-reg Pass 3: %rd_idxa_<dst.id> per IndexGet + shared %rd_idxs_addr per fn, U64 bank
ld.param prologue: each KERNEL param now loaded via ld.param.<ty> %<reg>, [<kernel>_param_<i>] at entry block (was: param registers declared but uninitialised)
_nvptx_elem_size_for_kind helper: byte-width per RKIND (F64=8, F32=4, F16/BF16=2, U64=8, U32=4)

lower_test_regression.note: All RFC 055 + RFC 067 + RFC 068 + RFC 069 lower_test cases retained byte-eq
